title: HOTOR Insulated Lunch Box for Men & Women - Leak-Proof Cooler Lunch Bag with 4 Pockets, Adjustable Strap, Ideal for Work, Picnic, Travel - Medium, Black, 25.9 x 17.5 x 21.6cm
features: SUPERIOR INSULATION: The HOTOR lunch bag for women features an excellent 3-layer insulation system: the outer layer is 600D sturdy Oxford cloth, the middle is 3mm thick and insulated pearl cotton, and the inner is food-safe PEVA material. This cooler bag ensures your meals stay at the perfect temperature for hours, keeping cool for up to 7 hours and warm for up to 6 hours.

LARGE CAPACITY: The HOTOR adult lunch box is compact yet spacious and can easily fit a full day's meals, including food containers, beverages, and snacks. Moreover, it has multipurpose pockets for organized storage, including a front zippered pocket for napkins and keys, stretchable mesh pockets for water bottles, and an inner mesh pocket for cutlery and ice packs.

100% LEAK-PROOF: With reinforced PEVA lining and hot-pressing technology without gaps, the HOTOR insulated lunch box is 100% leak-proof, keeping the rest of your items clean and dry. Besides, you can simply wipe to clean the lining in case of any accidental spills. Whether it's soup, sauce, or a chilled drink, carry your food with confidence.

HIGH-QUALITY DETAILS: Crafted from premium materials, the HOTOR insulated lunch box blends durability with style. The high-density waterproof Oxford cloth and robust stitching resist daily wear and tear for long-term use. In addition, the heavy-duty zippers allow smooth glide. This lunch bag is built to last and designed to impress.

EASY TO CARRY AROUND: The HOTOR insulated lunch bag provides 2 carrying options, offering a practical and convenient solution for on-the-go use. The adjustable padded shoulder strap provides comfort during commutes or trips, and the sturdy top handle makes the bag easy to grab and go. This versatile lunch bag is ideal for work, school, picnics, camping, and travel.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: transporting hot meals to the office, carrying packed lunches for school or work, bringing meals on picnics or outdoor excursions, travel
specifications_table.Included Components: Utensil, Bottle, Napkin, Food Container, Ice Pack
